concept: Solitaire Cash is a competitive Klondike Solitaire game where players compete head-to-head or in tournaments against others on identical pre-dealt decks, aiming for the highest score within a strict time limit. Core gameplay involves standard Solitaire moves: tapping or dragging cards to build down in alternating colors on the tableau and moving aces to foundations, with scoring based on cards moved, time remaining, and moves made.
name: Solitaire Cash
